summary.safestNextChange: Add a post-assignment workflow transition (P158.3): when recruiter is auto-assigned and immediate hard blockers pass, set workflowStatus=Paperwork Needed, actionType=send-paperwork, and re-run P157 — this removes the artificial gate causing 0/25 paperwork advancement without bypassing duplicate, email, or signature checks.
